done_summary:
Successfully extracted all 20 fields from the Veridyne Networks Q3 FY2026 press release into `/workspace/extraction_results.json`. 

Key results:
- All 20 schema fields were found and extracted with correct types (string, integer, number, date)
- All values are in the correct units as specified (USD millions, percent, ISO 8601 dates)
- No uncertain fields — every field had a clear value in the press release
- Revenue: $187.4M (38% YoY growth), Subscription: $171.2M
- Non-GAAP operating income: $9.8M (positive, not loss)
- 4,117 total customers, 1,082 above $100K ARR, 71 above $1M ARR
- ARR: $710M, NDR: 124%
- 1,847 FTEs at quarter end
- Stitchwise acquisition: $115M total consideration, closed 2026-01-22
- FY2026 revenue guidance raised to $722-$726M
- $200M share repurchase authorization

Also produced `/workspace/notes.md` documenting all extraction decisions.
